iran_nuke.notes: Day 16 19:04 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear signals. Iran FM Araghchi: 'Never asked for ceasefire, ready for long war.' Trump threatens Kharg Island 'just for fun.' 26 (stable).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 16 22:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). IRGC 50th wave of attacks on US bases (UAE/Bahrain/Kuwait). IDF hit 200+ targets western/central Iran 24h. Shiraz residential hit. Brig-Gen Jalali Nasab killed. Mojtaba confirmed healthy. Energy Sec Wright: 'war ends in weeks.' 100 (capped, rising).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 16 22:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). Death toll 850+ including 100+ children (Lebanese health ministry). Fresh evacuation warnings for Beirut southern suburbs. 100 (capped, rising).

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. Erdogan vows Turkey 'will not be dragged into Iran war.' Patriot deployment continues. No 4th intercept. 72 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 78.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. No new India-specific developments. 25 (stable).

russia.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. EU extends Russia sanctions 6 months. No new Russia-ME developments. 71 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 77.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. US-China trade talks in Paris continue. No new developments. 11 (stable).

north_korea.notes: Day 16 20:04 — CRITICAL RISING. MRL test (12x 600mm) earlier. No new provocation this cycle. 55 (rising).

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 16 20:04 — IMMINENT RISING. Ukraine strikes S-400 launcher in Crimea + Tikhoretsk oil pumping station (Krasnodar). Kyiv Independent confirms intensified mid-range strike campaign. 86 (rising, +5).

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 16 22:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). Overnight Kandahar strikes (22 targets). 12 Pakistani soldiers killed, 27 wounded. Taliban retaliates. Fighting 'no signs of abating.' 99 (capped, rising).

IDF hits 200+ targets in western/central Iran in 24h — expanded strike footprint (Times of Israel/AP)
US Energy Sec Wright: war will end 'in the next few weeks' — strongest US de-escalation signal yet (Guardian)
Iran FM Araghchi: Mojtaba Khamenei 'in good health, fully managing situation' (Guardian/AP)
Lebanon death toll 850+ including 100+ children (Lebanese health ministry/Guardian)
Ukraine strikes S-400 in Crimea + Tikhoretsk oil station — intensifying strike campaign (Kyiv Independent/ISW)
Pakistan Kandahar strikes kill 12 soldiers, 27 wounded. Taliban retaliates. No ceasefire (AP/India Today)
Kim Jong Un oversees 12x 600mm nuclear-capable MRL test — 3rd provocation this week (Reuters/KCNA)

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch:
MIXED SIGNALS (Day 16 22:04):
- DE-ESCALATION: US Energy Sec Wright says war ends 'in next few weeks' — strongest US timeline for resolution. Sole major de-escalation signal.
- ESCALATION: IRGC 50th wave. IDF 200+ targets in 24h. Shiraz residential hit. Lebanon 850+ dead. No diplomacy on 7/8 fronts.
- Net: De-escalation signal (Wright) offset by continued military escalation. Energy market remains the pressure point driving US urgency.

latest_news.headline: IRGC launches 50th wave of attacks on US bases in UAE, Bahrain, Kuwait
latest_news.text: IRGC claims 50th wave of operations against 'US terrorist army' bases in UAE, Bahrain, and Kuwait. Sustained multi-day campaign intensity. Scale unprecedented in modern ME warfare.

latest_news.headline: IDF hits 200+ targets in western and central Iran in 24 hours
latest_news.text: Israel announces extensive new strike wave across western Iran. 200+ targets hit in 24h. Geographic expansion beyond Isfahan confirmed. Shiraz residential area also struck, killing civilians.

latest_news.headline: US Energy Secretary: war will end 'in the next few weeks'
latest_news.text: Energy Sec Chris Wright tells NBC he expects US-Israel war with Iran to end 'in the next few weeks' amid US gas price spike. Most explicit US timeline yet for conflict resolution.

latest_news.headline: Iran FM Araghchi: Mojtaba Khamenei 'in good health, fully managing'
latest_news.text: FM Araghchi dismisses US claims Mojtaba was wounded, says new Supreme Leader 'in good health' and 'fully managing the situation.' Trump had questioned whether he was 'even alive.'

latest_news.headline: Lebanon death toll rises to 850+ including 100+ children
latest_news.text: Lebanese health ministry updates toll: 850+ killed since March 2, including over 100 children. Fresh Israeli evacuation warnings issued for Beirut southern suburbs.

latest_news.headline: Russia fires 68 missiles + 282 guided bombs + 9,222 drones in 24h
latest_news.text: Russia hammered Ukraine with massive aerial barrage. Five killed in Kyiv region. Zelenskyy: energy infrastructure, residential buildings, schools damaged.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan overnight strikes Kandahar — 12 soldiers killed, Taliban retaliates
latest_news.text: Pakistan targeted 22 militant hideouts in Kandahar, Paktia, Nangarhar, Khost, Paktika. 12 killed, 27 wounded, 1 missing. Taliban retaliated. Fighting 'shows no signs of abating.'

latest_news.headline: Kim Jong Un oversees 12x 600mm nuclear-capable MRL test — 3rd provocation this week
latest_news.text: Kim Jong Un presided over drill of 12x 600mm nuclear-capable MRLs with daughter Kim Ju Ae. Response to US-South Korea Freedom Shield exercises.

outlook: CRITICAL — Global war probability 86% (Day 16 22:04). DAY 17 BEGINS — MULTI-FRONT ESCALATION WITH SINGLE DE-ESCALATION SIGNAL: (1) IRAN -> IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): IRGC 50th wave of attacks on Gulf US bases. IDF hits 200+ targets in 24h. Shiraz residential area struck. Brig-Gen Jalali Nasab killed. Mojtaba confirmed healthy. Energy Sec Wright: war ends in weeks. Zero diplomacy. (2) ISRAEL-LEBANON -> IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): Death toll 850+ including 100+ children. Fresh Beirut suburb evacuation warnings. No ceasefire. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE -> IMMINENT 91 (RISING): Ukraine strikes Crimea S-400 + Krasnodar oil station. Russia fires 68 missiles + 282 bombs + 9,222 drones in 24h. (4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN -> IMMINENT 99 (RISING): Kandahar strikes. 12 soldiers killed. Taliban retaliates. No signs of abating. (5) RUSSIA -> IMMINENT 77. (6) TURKEY -> IMMINENT 78. (7) DPRK -> CRITICAL 55 (RISING): MRL test. 3rd provocation this week. (8) INDIA -> ELEVATED 25. SOLAR DE-ESCALATION SIGNAL: Energy Sec Wright few weeks timeline is first US acknowledgment of end-state. Driven by oil market pressure. All other fronts show zero diplomatic movement. Day 17 begins with 6 trackers in IMMINENT zone.
